title: Mineconnected
description:
This resource pack was created & tested using Connectedness and Continuity.

It adds connected textures and overlays. It is also compatible with Blooming Blocks.
body:
Requirements:

Forge 1.19.2 Users: Connectedness or Optifine

Fabric 1.19.2 Users: Continuity 

 

This resource pack was created & tested using Connectedness and Continuity.

It adds connected textures and overlays. It is also compatible with Blooming Blocks.

 

Connected Textures:

Bookshelves
Chiseled Stone Bricks
Diamond Blocks
Emerald Blocks
End Portal Frames
Glass
Gold Blocks
Iron Blocks
Jukeboxes
Lapis Blocks
Note Blocks
Polished Andesite
Polished Blackstone
Polished Deepslate
Polished Diorite
Polished Granite
Red Sandstone
Sandstone
Smooth Stone
Smooth Stone Slabs
 

Overlay Textures:

Coarse Dirt
Crimson Nylium
Dirt
Grass Blocks
Gravel
Magma Blocks
Muddy Roots
Mycelium
Netherrack
Podzol
Red Sand
Sand
Sculk
Snow Blocks
Warped Nylium
